{{CargoRelic
|name=Parsia Postcard
|class_id=20177
|rank=Green
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=While scouting for info about the Ultimate Weapon in Parsia, the Traveler recorded a lot of local customs, which were brought together in this postcard. You can read it to kill time or post it for likes!
|fame=18
|art=26
|fth=12
|civ=21
|tech=13
|ss1=prop@69948_2
|ss2=prop@69948_2
|ss3=prop@69948_2
|ss4=prop@69948_2
|ss7=prop@69948_2<br> (Awakened)
}}
